title: Moenchia mantica
taxonomy: Moenchia mantica is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. Moenchia mantica is a member of the genus Moenchia, which consists of several species of succulent plants. The plant has small, white flowers and is often found in dry, rocky areas. The classification of Moenchia mantica is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Caryophyllales, family - Caryophyllaceae, genus - Moenchia, species - M. mantica.
